# 🏥 **HEALTH CHECK FAILURE INCIDENT REPORT**

- **Severity**: P0/P1/P2/P3
- **Component**: [Component Name]
- **Date**: [YYYY-MM-DD]
- **Reporter**: [Your Name]

## **Health Check Failure Type**

- [ ] Component hangs indefinitely
- [ ] No timeout mechanism
- [ ] No health status reporting
- [ ] Blocks dependent operations
- [ ] Health status API unavailable
- [ ] Health indicators API unavailable

- **Affected Systems**: [List of affected systems]
- **User Impact**: [Description of user impact]
- **Business Impact**: [Description of business impact]

## **Root Cause Analysis**

- **Primary Cause**: [Root cause]
- **Contributing Factors**: [Contributing factors]
- **Health Check Issues**: [List of health check issues]

## **Expected Resolution**

- **Solution Required**: [Description of required solution]
- **Health Monitoring Restoration**: [List of health monitoring features to restore]
- **Testing Required**: [Description of required testing]
- **Validation Required**: [Description of required validation]

## **Additional Context**

- **Error Messages**: [Any error messages]

- **Screenshots**: [Any relevant screenshots]
